mapper.sql: subject_id, tenant_id, title, subject_type, scope, scope_reference_id, status, publish_at, vote_start_at, vote_end_at, clock_suspended_at, clock_suspended_by_subject_id, settled_at, party_ratio_floor, max_winners, version, create_time, proposed_by_user_id, cancelled_at, cancelled_by_user_id, cancel_reason
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_voting_subject WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_voting_subject SET status = #{newStatus}, settled_at = CASE WHEN #{newStatus} = 5 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE settled_at END, review_history = COALESCE(review_history, '[]'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_array(CAST(#{reviewEntryJson} AS JSONB)), version = version + 1 WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_voting_subject WHERE status = 3 AND vote_end_at IS NOT NULL AND vote_end_at < #{now} AND clock_suspended_at IS NULL ORDER BY vote_end_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_voting_subject SET status = 6, cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt}, cancelled_by_user_id = #{cancelledByUserId}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, version = version + 1 WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_voting_subject WHERE status = 2 AND vote_start_at IS NOT NULL AND vote_start_at <= #{now} AND clock_suspended_at IS NULL ORDER BY vote_start_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_voting_subject SET clock_suspended_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, clock_suspended_by_subject_id = #{electionSubjectId}, version = version + 1 WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND subject_type != 1 AND status IN (2, 3) AND clock_suspended_at IS NULL

UPDATE t_voting_subject SET vote_start_at = CASE WHEN status = 2 AND vote_start_at IS NOT NULL THEN vote_start_at + (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - clock_suspended_at) ELSE vote_start_at END, vote_end_at = CASE WHEN vote_end_at IS NOT NULL THEN vote_end_at + (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - clock_suspended_at) ELSE vote_end_at END, clock_suspended_at = NULL, clock_suspended_by_subject_id = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND clock_suspended_at IS NOT NULL
mapper.select: SELECT subject_id FROM t_voting_subject WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND subject_type = 1 AND status IN (2, 3, 4) ORDER BY subject_id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM t_voting_subject
ORDER BY create_time DESC, subject_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
